Free QR Code Generator

No sign-up. No watermark. Codes never expire. Create QR codes for links, text, WiFi, and contact cards — with your logo and colors — right in your browser.

Start typing — your QR code updates live.

Free forever · static codes never expire

♾️ Never expires

Static codes encode your content directly in the image. No account to lapse, no subscription to cancel, no dead codes on printed material.

🔒 Private by design

Everything runs locally in your browser. WiFi passwords, contact details, and URLs are never uploaded to our servers.

🎨 Logo & colors, free

Add your logo, pick brand colors, and export high-resolution PNG or vector SVG for print — features other generators lock behind paywalls.

Frequently asked questions

Is this QR code generator really free?

Yes. Every static QR code — URL, text, WiFi, and vCard — is generated free in your browser with no sign-up, no watermark, and no expiration. Premium only adds dynamic codes with editing and scan tracking.

Do the QR codes ever expire?

No. Static QR codes encode your content directly into the image, so they work forever. There is no account, no subscription, and no server that can shut them off.

Is my data uploaded to a server?

No. Codes are generated entirely in your browser with JavaScript. Your URLs, WiFi passwords, and contact details never leave your device.

Can I add my logo to the QR code?

Yes, free. Upload a PNG, JPG, SVG, or WebP logo and it is placed in the center of the code. Error correction is automatically raised to High so the code stays scannable.

See the full FAQ page for more details.

Need Dynamic QR Codes? Go Premium

Free static QR codes never expire and work forever. Premium adds dynamic codes: change the destination URL any time without reprinting, and track every scan with analytics.

⚡ Support & Unlock Premium Stripe checkout coming soon
  • 🔄 Editable destination — fix typos and swap links after printing
  • 📊 Scan analytics — counts, locations, and devices
  • 🚫 No ads, bulk generation, priority support
